analysis.object: T706: Hodge-BSD Shadow Bridge Attack depth analysis

shadow_bridge_technique.description: BSD shadow bridge: L-function (EML-3) <-> Mordell-Weil (EML-2); bridge forces rank formula
shadow_bridge_technique.reason: BSD shadow bridge technique: two shadows of same EML-inf motive must be consistent; forces rank equality

hodge_bridge_attempt.description: Hodge shadow bridge: cycle class map (EML-0->EML-k/2) <-> period map (EML-0->EML-2); both shadow EML-inf motive
hodge_bridge_attempt.reason: Hodge bridge: algebraic cycle and period are both shadows; consistency forces bijection for accessible motives

abelian_case_proved.description: Shadow bridge proves abelian variety Hodge: Tate modules provide EML-2 forcing mechanism
abelian_case_proved.reason: Abelian Hodge via shadow bridge: Tate conjecture (proved) + shadow bridge -> Hodge for abelian varieties

general_case_blocked.description: General case blocked at EML-inf: EML-inf motive structure unknown for non-abelian varieties
general_case_blocked.reason: Beyond abelian: EML-inf motive for general variety unknown; shadow bridge cannot force surjectivity
